## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (false positive, crash, incorrect result)
- [ ] New check or feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Type-check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Manually tested against a real website

## Checklist

- [ ] No false positives introduced (tested against 2+ real sites)
- [ ] HTML report renders correctly with the change
- [ ] CLI output is clear and actionable
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or justified if so)
